conversation.message_text: Lily & Fox: Welcome to Lily & Fox! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Lily & Fox: Welcome! We'll text you about secret releases & new designs as they happen. Shop now! https://lilyfox.attn.tv/aj3t06mfefLn .
Lily & Fox: Don't forget to save our contact to get exclusive updates!
Lily & Fox: Hey Teressa, It's the perfect time to refresh your nails with a gorgeous new design! Take a look at our new collection! lilyfox.attn.tv/aNn3CMX3goI5
Lily & Fox: Thanks for reaching out! if you need additional help please reach us at help@lilyandfox.com. Text STOP to opt out.
I only like glitter nails
Lily & Fox: Thanks for your interest. You can check our collection here: https://lilyfox.attn.tv/acxmgPfwokj7

Y'all shouldn't mix the pedicures with the manicures because y'all sent me pedicures and I did not order them. I ordered manicure last time. I have ordered from y'all a few times I'm getting ready to make another order.

Lily & Fox: I'm so sorry to hear that! If you received the wrong order, the best way to resolve this is by emailing us directly at help@lilyandfox.com. Our team will be happy to assist you and get everything sorted out!
Yes, I ordered the less bitter more glitter nails and  I got pedicure.I tried to get a hold of y'all. It was difficult.

Lily & Fox: Thank you for clarifying and I'm really sorry for the inconvenience once again. Please email us directly and rest assured that one of my colleagues will follow up with you in no time! Is there anything else I can assist you with in the meantime? I'll be happy to!
Thank you!
Lily & Fox: No worries! I'll be here if you need anything, so please don't hesitate to send me a text anytime. Have a great day!
You too 😊
I'm sorry to bother you again, but is there anyway I can find what I ordered in the past because there was a color kinda like a champagne glitter that I loved
I found the champagne ice petty, but not the manicure. Do you know if y'all have them? I can't find a search bar.

Lily & Fox: Happy to help! I just double-checked and you're referring to our Pink Champagne color here - https://lilyfox.attn.tv/ajwZmST9CjZh Let me know what you think, I'm here to help you find the perfect choice for you!
Yeah, I have those in my buggy right now, but I was looking for the champagne ice as well

Lily & Fox: Thanks for informing me! I apologize for the inconvenience. I see you're interested in the Champagne Ice, and currently, we only have it available in the Pedicure option, not the manicure. Here's the link to that: https://lilyfox.attn.tv/a8sTq6WdMBxS 

If you're open to exploring other options, what do you think about the Peach Champagne? It's available as a manicure, and it could be a great alternative! Here's the link for that: https://lilyfox.attn.tv/ayt-L_Txib79 Let me know if either of these work for you!
Yes, I did order the peach champagne as well. I just made my order. I paid the 1.99 so I could track my order, but I don't understand what it's telling me to do.🤦‍♀️

Lily & Fox: Awesome! Thank you for your purchase, and great choice on the Peach Champagne! It's such a nice color! Could you please send me a screenshot of what you're seeing when you try to track your order? This way, I can check on my end and assist you further!
When I first ordered it, it popped up and told me how to track my order and I did not understand and now I cannot find it anywhere. I think it was telling me that I had to download an app.
I wish I have gave my email instead of just my phone number then maybe it would've been in an email

Lily & Fox: My apologies for the inconvenience. Unfortunately, our free shipping option does not include a tracking number, but we do offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you're not satisfied with your order for any reason, we will refund your money!

If you'd like to receive a tracking number, please choose one of our paid shipping options at checkout. This will also ensure your order arrives super fast. If you need further assistance, please don't hesitate to email us again directly at help@lilyandfox.com. Our team will be happy to look into this for you.
I paid extra to get a tracking number and faster delivery

Lily & Fox: My apologies for the confusion! I would recommend reaching out to our team directly for this actually, unfortunately, I don't have access to order tracking info on my end but our team will be more than happy to help.

send_to_cs: No ESC for this client, send everything to CS using the "Escalation template"
templates: For 10% off welcome code issues use temp 'Follow up 1', then 'Follow up 2' after confirming the item is excluded from promos
For fridge recommendations use FRR shortcut
For service-related issues/scheduled repair service appointments use SRI shortcut
For cxs looking for replacement parts/accessories from an affiliate Parts Distributor use RPA shortcut
If a cx has an inquiry for finding the serial number/model number of an item:
➜ If it's a TV, use mnt shortcut
➜ If it's another product, use mna shortcut
dos_and_donts: If it's a new conversation and we didn't introduce ourselves in the automated message, start your message with: "This is Jordan at LG."

WHITE + WARREN: Hey , this is Sarah. Thanks for checking out our site! 😊 https://whiteandwarren.attn.tv/acRHVAQ1jE_D 

Are you looking for anything in particular today?
Looking at cashmere ribbed patch pocket cardigan. I'm usually a   Small. Wondering if I could wear an extra small. How large does this sweater run?

WHITE + WARREN: My apologies for the late message. You can check out our size guide on the product page, just click find your size. Our clothes generally run true to size. Would you mind providing your measurements? I'd be happy to check if an XS would work for you.

WHITE + WARREN: Thanks. I'd recommend a size small based on the measurement provided. You can check it out here: https://whiteandwarren.attn.tv/sl/6EPzyhKu Let me know if you have any further questions.
Thanks. I did look at the measurements but I know "relaxed" fit can often mean too big.
The light gray was the only color I was interested in so I guess I'll have to pass due to final sale.

WHITE + WARREN: I understand. The light gray's small is out of stock. I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend signing up on the product page so you're notified the second it comes back in! What do you think about the Spruce Heather instead? https://whiteandwarren.attn.tv/sl/kmXv9cOX
No. Only light colors for me
If it wasn't final sale I'd try the XS.
